title: Ski Slope Lane
summary: A descent is like a ski run: control first, speed second.
memoryHook: You do not race the hill; you steer down it.

title: Tight Spiral
summary: A hairpin turn is a spiral staircase that forces a patient step.
memoryHook: You climb the curve one controlled step at a time.

title: Lantern in Fog
summary: Low visibility asks for slower movement so the light still works.
memoryHook: If the lantern cannot reach, you are moving too fast.

title: Rope Bridge Gap
summary: Following distance is the rope bridge that keeps you from falling into another driver's braking.
memoryHook: Leave the rope slack before the stop arrives.

title: Cliff Marker
summary: Guardrails and edge markings are the cliff markers that remind you where the world ends.
memoryHook: Read the marker before you trust the edge.

title: Anchor Descent
summary: Braking on a slope should feel like anchoring before drift, not resisting after.
memoryHook: Drop the anchor before the current picks up.

title: Folded Map
summary: A switchback road unfolds like a folded map that reveals its next line one fold at a time.

title: Stone Trail
summary: Gravel is a trail of loose stones that punishes sharp steps.
memoryHook: Step lighter when the stones shift.
